untranslatable_reason: Signal requires KST indicator and ROC (Rate of Change) which are not in the allowed indicator list. Also requires detection of 'first turn in trendline' which cannot be expressed with available operators and indicators. KST is a composite momentum indicator and ROC is not available; MACD was used as a reasonable momentum-based substitute, but this is an approximation and does not capture the original signal logic.
translation_notes: Original signal uses KST (Know Sure Thing) indicator crossed with ROC line, plus detection of trendline inflection points. These specific indicators and the trend-turn detection logic are not available in the allowed indicator set. Substituted MACD crossovers with moving average direction alignment as a trend-following momentum alternative. Weekly data frequency noted but not enforced in JSON structure. This translation significantly deviates from the original signal intent.
